name: lumen
description: Local AI assistant for medical imaging — view DICOM scans (PET, CT, MRI), get structured AI observations, prepare questions for the doctor. BYO Claude/GPT-5/Gemini key. Loopback-only, PHI-scrubbed. Not a medical device.

scripts.install:all: cd web && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.typecheck: cd web && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../server && npx tsc --noEmit
